3192590.name: 結晶姫のラビリンス
3192590.description:
*Additional game trailers, demo versions, and official translations will be released as soon as the beta version is completed.

Overview.

Labyrinth of Crystal Princess is a single-player horror adventure.

With a thrilling tale of a top-secret project that uncovers the dark side of the project,

Invisible Puzzles, the game offers a new gaming experience for everyone.

Story.

An explosion in a laboratory causes Hiyo to fall into an underground labyrinth.

Hiyo decides to escape, but something terrifying and “invisible” is stirring in front of her...

Features.

  • Controls: Move + action buttons

  • Map exploration: Discover information about the invisible man and the diary that describes the darkness of the institute.

  • Labyrinth stage: Puzzle element to detect the invisible creature and find the exit without being attacked

  • Multiple endings: Three different endings depending on the player's dialogue and choices

  • Headphones and controllers for an even more immersive experience.
